sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Judiciary Administration Shorttitle
sections.text:
1. This Act may be cited as the Judiciary Administration Shorttitle
(Amendment)Act,2018andshallbereadasonewiththeJudiciary ActNo.23
AdministrationAct, 2016,in thisAct referred toas the principal of2016
Act.

sections.heading: (1) Ajudgeofasuperiorcourtshallhavearesearch
sections.text:
13. (1) Ajudgeofasuperiorcourtshallhavearesearch
advocate,whoisapractitioner.
(2) The Judicial Service Commission may appoint
research assistants for surbordinate courts with such
qualificationasitmaydetermine.
(3) Despite subsection (2), a person shall only be
appointedasaresearchassistantifthepersonisaholderof
abacheloroflawsdegreefromarecogniseduniversity.
